title: poa myriantha
intro: Poa myriantha, also known as the Himalayan blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Poa myriantha is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of tinctures and extracts.
